div.head: The Minister Resident in Saudi Arabia (Moose) to the Secretary of State
div.p: 243. ReLegs 237, August 6, noon. To achieve a feature of stability in riyal-sovereign rate during pilgrimage, the Saudi Government should offer to convert sovereigns into riyals at a fixed rate. Jordan concurs in opinion that such procedure is practicable and desirable. Such plan, which requires a quantity of riyals in Saudi Government hands at beginning of pilgrimage season, was effective last year though Government sales were small.

Please advise what portion, if any, of 10 million subsidy riyals can be delivered in Jidda by October 15. If the answer is “none” please investigate possibility of obtaining riyals from those already minted for dollar riyal conversion scheme and later replacement from subsidy riyals.
